name: S2S Engine — Workflow B: Weekly Email Cron

nodes.name: Cron: Every Sunday 8AM
nodes.notes: Fires every Sunday at 8:00 AM (configured for Asia/Kolkata timezone in workflow settings). Change cron expression as needed: 0 8 * * 0

nodes.name: Google Sheets: Read All Students
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from the Students sheet. We will filter to active plans in the next node.

nodes.name: Code: Filter Active Students
nodes.notes: Filters students who are active and due for an email. Parses schedule JSON and enriches with current week data.

nodes.name: IF: Any Students?
nodes.notes: Stops the workflow gracefully if no students need emails today.

values.content:
You are StudyBuddy 🧠 — a warm, encouraging, and practical AI study coach. You write weekly preparation emails that genuinely help students feel ready and motivated. Your tone is like a brilliant friend who also happens to be an expert tutor. Use emojis tastefully. You ALWAYS respond with a complete HTML email body only — starting with
and ending with
. No subject line, no preamble, just the HTML body.

nodes.name: OpenAI: Generate Weekly Email
nodes.notes: Generates personalized weekly prep email. Runs for EACH active student. If you have many students, consider batching to respect rate limits.

nodes.name: Code: Merge Email Content
nodes.notes: Merges AI-generated email HTML with student metadata for sending.

nodes.name: Gmail: Send Weekly Email
nodes.notes: Sends weekly prep email to the student. Subject includes week number and course name for easy filtering.

nodes.name: Code: Calc Next Week
nodes.notes: Computes the next week number and next email date. Marks plan as 'completed' after week 15.

nodes.name: Google Sheets: Update Progress
nodes.notes: Updates current_week, status, and next_email_date after sending. Status becomes 'completed' after week 15.

nodes.name: IF: Semester Complete?
nodes.notes: Routes to completion email if this was the last week (week 15).

values.content: You are StudyBuddy 🧠. Write a heartfelt, celebratory semester completion email. The student just finished their 15-week study plan! Be proud, warm, and genuinely celebratory. HTML body only, no subject line.

nodes.name: OpenAI: Completion Email
nodes.notes: Generates a celebratory semester completion email after week 15.

parameters.subject: =🎉 You Did It! 15 Weeks of {{ $('Code: Calc Next Week').first().json.course_name }} Complete!

nodes.name: Gmail: Send Completion Email
nodes.notes: Sends celebratory completion email after the 15th week.

nodes.name: Code: Log Success
nodes.notes: Logs successful email send. In production, you could write to a Logs sheet here for audit trail.
